mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate compress equity discount rates and stimulate corporate borrowing, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over rolling 3-year windows, or forward returns during rate cuts are statistically indistinguishable from zero.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate exceeding 5.0% signals deteriorating labor market conditions and reduced consumer spending power, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in 65% of instances when UNRATE crosses 5.0%, or the signal loses predictive power during recessionary periods.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in real personal income and consumer price inflation indicate robust demand outpacing supply constraints, driving positive equity returns as corporate revenues expand.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict positive returns when inflation exceeds 4.0% annually, or interaction term coefficient becomes statistically insignificant in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production growth signals improving manufacturing capacity utilization and supply chain normalization, generating positive short-term S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: Signal direction reverses during supply-constrained regimes, or 5-day forward returns show no statistical correlation with INDPRO momentum.

mechanism_narrative: Rising housing starts reflect increased residential investment and construction sector activity, which translates into higher corporate earnings and positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: Housing starts fail to predict forward returns when mortgage rates exceed 6.0%, or the correlation coefficient drops below 0.05 over rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Rapid monthly inflation acceleration triggers expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, compressing equity valuations and producing negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Equity markets continue to rally despite inflation spikes above the threshold, or the signal loses predictive accuracy when growth remains robust.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in total nonfarm payrolls and declining unemployment rates confirm broad-based labor market tightening, boosting consumer confidence and driving positive equity returns.
failure_condition: The combined labor signal fails to predict returns when wage growth stagnates, or the interaction effect becomes negative during productivity slowdowns.

mechanism_narrative: Subdued real GDP growth indicates weakening aggregate demand and corporate revenue pressure, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the subsequent quarter.
failure_condition: Equity markets remain resilient despite low GDP growth due to fiscal stimulus, or the threshold fails to separate positive and negative return regimes in walk-forward tests.
